stage: S4 (2016+ A0/A1/A2 Expansion) / P04 A2 重要区与功能区 cohort

value.user_value: Expanded the A2 registry by marginal value: 8 more high-value functional zones (Nansha, Zhoushan, Xihai'an, Hefei/East-Lake/Chengdu hi-tech, Binhai, Jiangbei) added, each providing first-line local-action signals (projects/pilots/procurement/industry-landing) -- the new cohort's verified-useful-signal rate (1.0) is not below the existing A2 baseline (1.0). A baseline-only zone and a media aggregator are rejected; admitting them would have dropped the rate to 0.8.
value.why_it_matters: Scaling A2 must not dilute quality -- each added zone must actually carry first-line operational signal, or the registry grows in count while the useful-signal rate falls. The marginal-value gate keeps expansion value-preserving.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a selection/expansion task over the T053 model -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: SHADOW (expanded A2 cohorts + marginal value report + health; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
